steps.title: This protocol prepares a 96 Agilent plate for qubit
steps.instruction: This protocol prepares a 96 Agilent plate for qubit. For detailed protocol steps, please see below.

steps.title: Transfer 190ul of buffer to column...
steps.instruction: Transfer 190ul of buffer to column 1, 2 of destination plate

steps.title: Transfer 198ul of buffer to eventual...
steps.instruction: Transfer 198ul of buffer to eventual sample columns of destination plate

steps.title: 10ul of standard 1 to column...
steps.instruction: 10ul of standard 1 to column 1, 10ul of standard 2 to column 2 of destination plate

steps.title: 2ul from samples to sample columns of destination plate
steps.instruction: 2ul from samples to sample columns of destination plate
